author: Britney Muller
title: The future of search visibility: What 6 SEO leaders predict for 2026
content: Britney Muller contributed SEO predictions for 2026, emphasizing that the biggest risk to the industry isn't AI itself, but applying traditional SEO ranking logic to probabilistic AI systems. She highlighted the strategic failure of fitting 'a baseball bat through a keyhole by applying SEO ranking logic to probabilistic systems.' Muller advocates for building unique, branded datasets as the strongest way to secure AI attribution. Her strategy: brands should build entity moats by strategically naming their data. When brands own unique metrics like '[Brand] Index' or '[Brand] Score,' they create sources of truth that AI models cannot synthesize or ignore, forcing AI systems to cite their names.
